en: Did you see that the teaser for the new Avatar movie just came out?
ko: 새 아바타 영화 티저가 나온 거 봤어? 예고편 끝에 흥미로운 표현이

en: We can hear an interesting phrase at the end of the trailer.
I know one thing, wherever we go, this family is our fortress.
Wherever means it doesn't matter the place or no matter where.
ko: Wherever는 장소가 상관없다는 뜻이야. WH 단어 끝에 ever를 붙여서 같은 방식으로 쓸 수 있어.

en: You can also apply this by adding ever to the end of the following WH words.
Whatever, no matter what. Whoever, no matter who.
Whenever, no matter when. Whichever, no matter which.
ko: 누구든. Whenever 언제든. Whichever 어느 것이든. However

en: Fortress is a large, strong building that can be defended from attacks.
ko: Fortress는 공격으로부터 방어할 수 있는 크고 튼튼한 건물이야. This family is our

en: The phrase, this family is our fortress, means that this family can protect us from outside attacks.
Be sure to like this video and share it with a friend who is also learning English.
